scripts.test:monolith: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:3000 k6 run --out influxdb=http://influxdb:8086/k6 /scripts/monolith-test.js
scripts.test:sharded: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:3000 k6 run --out influxdb=http://influxdb:8086/k6 /scripts/sharded-test.js
